offer: For accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, delays in payroll tax filings cause penalties. We automate the generation of monthly payroll tax filings instead of manual preparation of payroll tax filings.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting help
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on payroll
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Participate in forums for accounting tools
try_it: Let users try manual review option and reminders for filings
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual-first workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
